channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A New AI Technique Aims to Improve Generative AI's Answering Capabilities
item.description: Hebbia, a New York-based AI startup, has developed techniques that allow generative AI tools to answer questions beyond the information in their training data without regurgitating what they've read or making up information.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: AI megaprojects come with hidden costs
item.description: While Tesla’s stock has seen a sharp decline in recent weeks, Elon Musk has quietly been working to expand his influence in a different area of tech: AI supercomputing. Recent reports have revealed that Musk’s AI startup, xAI, has been quietly building a new data center in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Jason Ludwig, Fast Company

item.title: YouTube is testing a fix for the most annoying thing about subscriber notifications – and I'm fully on board
item.description: YouTube is in the middle of testing another feature, but this time its aim is stop bombarding you with unwanted notifications.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: DISA’s Jeff Marshall on aligning tech to solving warfighter problems
item.description: DISA pursues a two-pronged customer experience strategy to ensure its IT services meet warfighters’ needs, the director of J9 Hosting and Compute says.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Fire at Tesla dealership near Rome destroys 17 cars
item.description: Rome’s fire service said it was investigating “all avenues” while looking into how the fire started, but it did not rule out arson.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com, The Mercury News

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei says its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: Elaine Kurtenbach, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Microsoft looks to be making a big change to how you install and log in to Windows 11 – and I’m not happy about it at all
item.description: Microsoft just blocked one workaround to install Windows 11 with a local account, and you can bet other fudges will be on the chopping block, too.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 14 alternative managed Kubernetes platforms
item.description: Kubernetes is mighty powerful but highly complex. This has influenced many organizations to ditch self-hosted solutions and move toward more fully managed Kubernetes platforms. Nearly 90% of Kubernetes users use cloud-managed services, DataDog reported in 2021.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How AI is transforming IDEs into intelligent development assistants
item.description: Ever feel like you’re spending more time squashing bugs than actually building something? You’re not alone—developers spend a whopping 35% of their time debugging and reviewing code instead of writing it. That’s like ordering pizza and only eating the crust.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Samsung's Latest Vacuum: Does it Really Need AI?
item.description: Samsung's new vacuum uses AI to adjust suction and brushroll speed, but does it really need this technology? Our review takes a closer look.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: AI enables paralyzed man to control robotic arm with brain signals
item.description: The combination of artificial intelligence and neuroscience allows a paralyzed man to manipulate a robotic arm by using his brain to imagine movements.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The foldable iPhone display is rumored to be keeping the 4:3 aspect ratio of the iPad – and there's a good reason for it
item.description: The latest rumor around the folding iPhone suggests its screens will follow the aspect ratio of Apple's iPads.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Tiny Silicon Valley drugmaker soars on FDA win to treat never-ending hunger
item.description: Shares of the Redwood City-based Soleno Therapeutics climbed 38% — the biggest one-day gain since September 2023 — to their highest level in more than eight years.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Utah bans fluoride in public drinking water, a first in the US
item.description: Utah has become the first state to ban fluoride in public drinking water, despite widespread opposition from dentists and national health organizations.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Airtel connects India with 100Tbps submarine cable
item.description: In a significant development for digital infrastructure in India, Bharti Airtel has landed the 2Africa Pearls submarine cable, delivering 100 Terabits per second of international network capacity for the country. The submarine cable will connect to Airtel’s cable landing station (CLS) in Mumbai.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: La transformación digital, esencial para la supervivencia del sector asegurador
item.description: Los beneficios de la transformación digital ya son palpables para el sector asegurador. Así lo constata el informe Perspectivas de tecnología en seguros 2025: transformando la innovación en ventaja competitiva que firma Concentrix.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI culture war: Hidden bias in training models may push political propaganda
item.description: The release of Chinese-made DeepSeek has generated heated debate, but critics have largely ignored a huge problem: the potential for China to use such an AI model to push a cultural and political agenda on the rest of the world.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: China's Tron 1 robot hurdles over obstacles like they're nothing
item.description: Tron 1, a Chinese company's two-legged robot, is versatile and can walk, roll and pivot, even on rough terrain. Tron 1 stands 33 inches tall and weighs 44 pounds.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Signal chat discussion of 'clearly classified' information violated law, experts say
item.description: The inadvertent inclusion of a journalist on a Signal group chat discussing attack plans means officials likely violated the Espionage Act and public records laws while flouting guidance on how to discuss sensitive information.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: 6 advanced Gboard tricks for smarter Android typing
item.description: QWERTY, QWERTY, QWERTY. QWERTY. Oh — hi there! Sorry for the slightly nonsensical greeting. I’ve been thinking a lot about keyboards this week, y’see, and how that trusty ol’ QWERTY surface has evolved in our lives. Also, saying “QWERTY” over and over again is surprisingly fun to do.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Elon Musk privately pressured Reddit CEO Steve Huffman on content moderation: report
item.description: X owner Elon Musk was privately messaging with Reddit CEO Steve Huffman while also putting public pressure on the social media company’s content moderation efforts, The Verge reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cyber leaders seek to demonstrate ‘ROI’ in face of DOGE cuts
item.description: The DOGE impact on federal cyber spending remains to be seen, but cyber program leaders are hoping to avoid any major cuts by emphasizing the ROI. The post Cyber leaders seek to demonstrate ‘ROI’ in face of DOGE cuts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Commercial innovations to drive FedRAMP’s new approach
item.description: Pete Waterman, the director of the cloud security program known as FedRAMP, said four new community working groups will help give industry a bigger voice. The post Commercial innovations to drive FedRAMP’s new approach first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Oracle releases ML-optimized GraalVM for JDK 24
item.description: Oracle has released GraalVM for JDK 24, an alternative Java Development Kit tuned to just-released JDK 24 that uses ML (machine learning)-based profile inference to boost peak performance by about 7.9% on average on microservices benchmarks, the company said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative
item.description: The Trump administration has a '10 out, one in' rule for new regulations, but DoD officials are confident they can finalize the CMMC requirements soon. The post DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise targets IoT, industrial networks with private 5G package
item.description: Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise (ALE) has partnered with Celona to offer a turnkey private 5G package for industrial or IoT networks.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The nation’s statisticians worry about the state of federal data gathering
item.description: One of the government's activities is the gathering of reliable statistics to guide policy and the quality of national statistics has become a concern. The post The nation’s statisticians worry about the state of federal data gathering first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
